---
title: "Heeju Lim"
image: images/visa2.jpg
toc: false
about: 
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 20em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/heeju-lim-283382292/
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/heeju-lim
    - text: ResearchGate
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Heeju-Lim
---


## **Current Status**

-   **Ph.D Student in [Department of Statistics, University of Connecticut](https://stat.uconn.edu/)**

    Advisor : [Victor Hugo Lachos](https://hlachos.stat.uconn.edu/)

 {{< fa graduation-cap size=1.5x >}} M.S. in Statistics, Korea University, 2017
 
 {{< fa graduation-cap size=1.5x >}} B.S. in Statistics, Sejong University, 2015

## **Interests**

- Mixture Models
- Financial Statistics
- Time Series Analysis




## **Contact : [[{{< fa envelope size=2x >}}]{style="color:green"} ](mailto:heeju.lim@uconn.edu)**
